title: monoporus bipinnatus
side_effects: Monoporus bipinnatus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and swelling. Ingesting the plant's extracts can cause gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Long-term consumption of Monoporus bipinnatus may lead to kidney damage and liver toxicity. Additionally, improper use of the plant can also interact with certain medications, affecting their efficacy or causing adverse reactions.
